enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog on day three of 2017 from his home in Boulder. He recaps a low-key day of photography and organizing, mentions it snowed, and shares his plans to tidy his room and house to look more like his mom's well-organized home. He also mentions excitement about starting a TV show called 'Boulder Wrong Sacred Legend.'
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants his house to look well-organized like his mom's, feels he has neglected it since moving to Boulder three years ago
excited ('pretty jazzed') about getting it started but hedges with 'we'll see'
acknowledges it's hard to focus on one thing while organizing
